ddls:
CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "salary_amount" REAL /* Amount of the salary */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the salary became effective */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the salary ended (if applicable) */,
  "bonus_amount" REAL /* Amount of the bonus */,
  "pay_frequency" TEXT /* Pay frequency (e.g., monthly, bi-weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educations" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree obtained */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the degree was obtained */,
  "year_completed" INTEGER /* Year the degree was completed */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study (e.g., Computer Science, Business Administration) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_grades" (
  "job_grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job grade record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "grade" INTEGER /* Job grade level */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the job grade became effective */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the job grade ended (if applicable) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title (e.g., Junior Developer, Senior Manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tenure" (
  "tenure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tenure record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "years_bank" INTEGER /* Number of years the employee has worked at the bank */,
  "years_prior" INTEGER /* Number of years the employee worked at prior employers */,
  "total_experience" INTEGER /* Total years of experience in the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tenure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance evaluation */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance evaluation */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Performance rating (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the performance evaluation */,
  "goals" TEXT /* Employee's goals for the next evaluation period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the job position */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the position belongs to */,
  "grade" INTEGER /* Grade level of the position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job position */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Responsibilities of the job position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager in charge of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department's responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the manager */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager's position */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience in management */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_managers_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "benefit_name" TEXT /* Name of the benefit (e.g., health insurance, retirement plan) */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the benefit became effective */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the benefit ended (if applicable) */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the benefit (e.g., insurance company, investment firm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pc_jobs" (
  "pc_job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PC job record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "pc_job" TEXT /* Whether the employee is assigned to a PC job (Yes/No) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the PC job assignment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the PC job assignment ended (if applicable) */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pc_job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "data_viewed" TEXT /* Data viewed (e.g., employee information, performance evaluations) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., HR, Manager, Admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee whose data was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date when the changes were made */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaints" (
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complaint record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who filed the complaint */,
  "complaint_date" TEXT /* Date the complaint was filed */,
  "complaint_description" TEXT /* Description of the complaint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complaint_id")
)
